title: Savory Mexican Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl dish, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner. This recipe combines the best of savory and mexican flavors with a silky twist.

ingredients.name: Savory Roasted Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of bell peppers, zucchini, and onions

ingredients.name: Mexican Seasoning
ingredients.notes: A blend of cumin, chili powder, and paprika

ingredients.name: Diced Tomato
ingredients.notes: Fresh or canned, whichever suits your preference

ingredients.name: Shredded Cheese (optional)
ingredients.notes: Monterey Jack or Cheddar work well

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the Mexican seasoning and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the roasted vegetables and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Stir in the cooked rice and diced tomato.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the flavors are well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, topped with shredded cheese if desired.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
